summary: Official Polymarket CLI for market/event discovery and order book inspection.

auth.instructions: Read-only commands can run without credentials; follow Polymarket docs for any authenticated actions and API keys.

commands.name: events list
commands.description: Lists events available on Polymarket with paging options.

commands.name: markets list
commands.description: Lists markets with filters such as active/closed status and pagination options.

commands.name: clob book
commands.description: Fetches bids/asks for a market token from the CLOB.
